 * Duat Geodia API - SYNTHETIC_ONLY local-first simulation lab
 * OpenAPI spec version: 0.1.0
 */
import * as zod from "zod";

/**
 * @summary Health check
 */
export const HealthCheckResponse = zod.object({
  status: zod.string(),
});

/**
 * @summary List all WitnessLog events (SYNTHETIC_ONLY)
 */
export const listWitnessEventsQueryLimitDefault = 50;

export const ListWitnessEventsQueryParams = zod.object({
  limit: zod.coerce.number().default(listWitnessEventsQueryLimitDefault),
  event_type: zod.coerce.string().optional(),
});

export const ListWitnessEventsResponseItem = zod.object({
  id: zod.number(),
  timestamp: zod.coerce.date(),
  event_type: zod.enum([
    "boot",
    "config_set",
    "simulation_step",
    "sensorium_observe",
    "eml_weighted",
    "physics_compare",
    "bootstrap_done",
    "claim_gate",
    "handoff_export",
  ]),
  payload_summary: zod.string(),
  hash: zod.string(),
  previous_hash: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.enum([
    "SYNTHETIC_ONLY",
    "DEMO_ONLY",
    "PROTOTIPO",
    "SIMULACIÓN",
    "REVIEW_REQUIRED",
    "BLOCK",
  ]),
  run_fingerprint: zod.string(),
});
export const ListWitnessEventsResponse = zod.array(
  ListWitnessEventsResponseItem,
);

/**
 * @summary Append a new WitnessLog event
 */
export const AppendWitnessEventBody = zod.object({
  event_type: zod.enum([
    "boot",
    "config_set",
    "simulation_step",
    "sensorium_observe",
    "eml_weighted",
    "physics_compare",
    "bootstrap_done",
    "claim_gate",
    "handoff_export",
  ]),
  payload_summary: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.enum([
    "SYNTHETIC_ONLY",
    "DEMO_ONLY",
    "PROTOTIPO",
    "SIMULACIÓN",
    "REVIEW_REQUIRED",
    "BLOCK",
  ]),
  run_fingerprint: zod.string(),
});

/**
 * @summary Get last N witness events for live ticker
 */
export const getRecentWitnessEventsQueryNDefault = 10;

export const GetRecentWitnessEventsQueryParams = zod.object({
  n: zod.coerce.number().default(getRecentWitnessEventsQueryNDefault),
});

export const GetRecentWitnessEventsResponseItem = zod.object({
  id: zod.number(),
  timestamp: zod.coerce.date(),
  event_type: zod.enum([
    "boot",
    "config_set",
    "simulation_step",
    "sensorium_observe",
    "eml_weighted",
    "physics_compare",
    "bootstrap_done",
    "claim_gate",
    "handoff_export",
  ]),
  payload_summary: zod.string(),
  hash: zod.string(),
  previous_hash: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.enum([
    "SYNTHETIC_ONLY",
    "DEMO_ONLY",
    "PROTOTIPO",
    "SIMULACIÓN",
    "REVIEW_REQUIRED",
    "BLOCK",
  ]),
  run_fingerprint: zod.string(),
});
export const GetRecentWitnessEventsResponse = zod.array(
  GetRecentWitnessEventsResponseItem,
);

/**
 * @summary List saved handoff artifacts
 */
export const ListHandoffsResponseItem = zod.object({
  id: zod.number(),
  created_at: zod.coerce.date(),
  estado: zod.string(),
  certeza: zod.string(),
  inferencia: zod.string(),
  incognita: zod.string(),
  accion_siguiente: zod.string(),
  blockers: zod.string(),
  fingerprint: zod.string(),
  tick: zod.number(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.string(),
});
export const ListHandoffsResponse = zod.array(ListHandoffsResponseItem);

/**
 * @summary Save a new handoff artifact
 */
export const SaveHandoffBody = zod.object({
  estado: zod.string(),
  certeza: zod.string(),
  inferencia: zod.string(),
  incognita: zod.string(),
  accion_siguiente: zod.string(),
  blockers: zod.string(),
  fingerprint: zod.string(),
  tick: zod.number(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.string(),
});

/**
 * @summary Get a specific handoff artifact
 */
export const GetHandoffParams = zod.object({
  id: zod.coerce.number(),
});

export const GetHandoffResponse = zod.object({
  id: zod.number(),
  created_at: zod.coerce.date(),
  estado: zod.string(),
  certeza: zod.string(),
  inferencia: zod.string(),
  incognita: zod.string(),
  accion_siguiente: zod.string(),
  blockers: zod.string(),
  fingerprint: zod.string(),
  tick: zod.number(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.string(),
});

/**
 * @summary Get current Duat Genesis configuration
 */
export const GetGenesisConfigResponse = zod.object({
  id: zod.number(),
  created_at: zod.coerce.date(),
  schema_version: zod.string(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  grid_size: zod.number(),
  truth_model: zod.string(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  eml_load: zod.number(),
  eml_saturation: zod.number(),
  eml_noise: zod.number(),
  eml_intrinsic_clarity: zod.number(),
  notes: zod.string().optional(),
  synthetic_only_claim: zod.boolean(),
  reproducible_fingerprint: zod.string(),
});

/**
 * @summary Save a genesis configuration snapshot
 */
export const SaveGenesisConfigBody = zod.object({
  schema_version: zod.string(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  grid_size: zod.number(),
  truth_model: zod.string(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  eml_load: zod.number(),
  eml_saturation: zod.number(),
  eml_noise: zod.number(),
  eml_intrinsic_clarity: zod.number(),
  notes: zod.string().optional(),
  synthetic_only_claim: zod.boolean(),
  reproducible_fingerprint: zod.string(),
});

/**
 * @summary List simulation state snapshots
 */
export const listSimulationSnapshotsQueryLimitDefault = 20;

export const ListSimulationSnapshotsQueryParams = zod.object({
  limit: zod.coerce.number().default(listSimulationSnapshotsQueryLimitDefault),
});

export const ListSimulationSnapshotsResponseItem = zod.object({
  id: zod.number(),
  created_at: zod.coerce.date(),
  tick: zod.number(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  run_fingerprint: zod.string(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  truth_model: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.string(),
  psi_r: zod.number(),
  psi_phi_eff: zod.number(),
  psi_j_c: zod.number(),
  psi_epsilon: zod.number(),
  psi_fatigue: zod.number(),
  psi_regime: zod.string(),
  eml_weight: zod.number(),
  grid_summary: zod.string(),
  leading_model: zod.string(),
  leading_model_score: zod.number(),
});
export const ListSimulationSnapshotsResponse = zod.array(
  ListSimulationSnapshotsResponseItem,
);

/**
 * @summary Save a synthetic simulation snapshot (SYNTHETIC_ONLY)
 */
export const SaveSimulationSnapshotBody = zod.object({
  tick: zod.number(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  run_fingerprint: zod.string(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  truth_model: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.string(),
  psi_r: zod.number(),
  psi_phi_eff: zod.number(),
  psi_j_c: zod.number(),
  psi_epsilon: zod.number(),
  psi_fatigue: zod.number(),
  psi_regime: zod.string(),
  eml_weight: zod.number(),
  grid_summary: zod.string(),
  leading_model: zod.string(),
  leading_model_score: zod.number(),
});

/**
 * @summary Get the most recent simulation snapshot
 */
export const GetLatestSimulationSnapshotResponse = zod.object({
  id: zod.number(),
  created_at: zod.coerce.date(),
  tick: zod.number(),
  seed: zod.number(),
  run_fingerprint: zod.string(),
  observer_profile: zod.string(),
  truth_model: zod.string(),
  mode: zod.string(),
  psi_r: zod.number(),
  psi_phi_eff: zod.number(),
  psi_j_c: zod.number(),

  psi_fatigue: zod.number(),
  psi_regime: zod.string(),
  eml_weight: zod.number(),

  leading_model: zod.string(),
  leading_model_score: zod.number(),
